tasks.title: Implement Speed Run mode for Daily Addicted
tasks.description: Add a Speed Run game mode alongside the existing daily puzzle. This includes: a mode selection screen, a 2.5-minute countdown timer, puzzle solved counter, auto-advance to next puzzle on completion, a results modal when time expires, and full isolation from daily puzzle localStorage state.
tasks.acceptance_criteria:
1. Mode selection entry point with 'Daily Puzzle' and 'Speed Run' buttons
2. 150-second countdown timer displayed prominently
3. Same puzzle grid and swap mechanics as daily mode
4. Auto-load new random puzzle on completion
5. Visible solved puzzle counter
6. 'Speed Run Over' modal on timer expiry showing total solved
7. No interference with daily puzzle localStorage
8. Daily puzzle mode unchanged
9. Random seeds for speed run puzzles
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context You are adding a Speed Run mode to a vanilla HTML/CSS/JS word puzzle game ("Daily Addicted"). There is NO build system, NO framework — just raw files served statically. ## Design Direction: "Dark Arcade" The existing dark theme uses `--bg-primary: #0f0f1a`, `--bg-secondary: #1a1a2e`, `--color-accent: #e94560`. For speed run: - Timer text uses `--color-accent` (#e94560) when under 30 seconds, with a pulse animation - Solved counter in bold white - Mode selector: two large full-width buttons stacked vertically. Daily = `--color-btn-primary` (#4361ee), Speed Run = `--color-accent` (#e94560) - Keep the existing font (`--font-main`) ## Architecture All code lives in 3 files: `index.html`, `css/style.css`, `js/game.js`. The game.js uses an IIFE pattern — all new code goes inside the existing IIFE. ### Key existing functions to reuse: - `generatePuzzle(seed)` — takes numeric seed, returns `{solution, grid, fixed, words, par}` - `mulberry32(seed)` — seeded RNG - `selectWords(rng)` — picks 4 valid words - `render()` — re-renders grid + swap counter - `checkRows()` — checks which rows match solution - `showMessage(text)` — toast message ### Key existing state: - `state` object with: `grid`, `solution`, `fixed`, `words`, `par`, `swaps`, `selected`, `completed`, `rowsComplete`, `initialGrid`, `date` - `STORAGE_KEY = 'daily-addicted-state'` — daily puzzle persistence - `saveState()` / `loadState()` — localStorage for daily only ## Implementation Steps ### 1. HTML changes (index.html) Add BEFORE `
`: ```html
Daily Addicted
Choose your mode
``` Add INSIDE `
`, before `#grid-container`: ```html
2:30
Solved: 0
``` Add a new modal for speed run results (after complete-modal): ```html

Speed Run Over!

``` ### 2. CSS changes (css/style.css) Add styles for: - `#mode-select` — full-screen centered flex column, shown by default - `.mode-btn` — large cards with icon, label, description - `.mode-btn-daily` — uses `--color-btn-primary` - `.mode-btn-speedrun` — uses `--color-accent` - `#speedrun-bar` — flex row, space-between, with timer and counter - `#speedrun-timer` — large bold font, monospace digits - `#speedrun-timer.critical` — red color + pulse animation - `.btn-speedrun` — accent color button - `.btn-secondary` — outline/ghost button - `#speedrun-modal` styles - Hide `
`, `
`, `
` when mode-select is shown (use `.game-active` class on `#app`) ### 3. JS changes (js/game.js) Inside the existing IIFE: **New state properties:** ```js var gameMode = null; // 'daily' | 'speedrun' var speedrunState = { timer: 150, intervalId: null, solved: 0, active: false }; ``` **Mode selection:** - `showModeSelect()` — show `#mode-select`, hide game, remove `.game-active` - `startDailyMode()` — set `gameMode = 'daily'`, hide mode select, add `.game-active`, run existing `init()` logic - `startSpeedRunMode()` — set `gameMode = 'speedrun'`, hide mode select, add `.game-active`, reset speedrun state, generate first puzzle with random seed, start timer, show speedrun bar, render **Random seed for speed run:** ```js function getRandomSeed() { return Math.floor(Math.random() * 2147483647) + 1; } ``` **Timer:** ```js function startSpeedRunTimer() { speedrunState.timer = 150; speedrunState.active = true; updateTimerDisplay(); speedrunState.intervalId = setInterval(function() { speedrunState.timer--; updateTimerDisplay(); if (speedrunState.timer <= 0) { endSpeedRun(); } }, 1000); } ``` **On puzzle complete in speed run:** Modify the `handleCellClick` completion block. When `allComplete && gameMode === 'speedrun'`: - Do NOT call `saveState()` - Do NOT show confetti or completion modal - Increment `speedrunState.solved` - Update solved display - Generate new puzzle with `getRandomSeed()` - Reset state (grid, solution, fixed, words, par, swaps, selected, completed, rowsComplete) - Call `render()` **On timer expiry:** - `endSpeedRun()` — clear interval, set `speedrunState.active = false`, set `state.completed = true` (to disable input), show speedrun results modal **State isolation:** - `saveState()` should early-return if `gameMode === 'speedrun'` - OR: simply never call `saveState()` from speed run paths (already handled by the completion logic change) - Add guard at top of `saveState()`: `if (gameMode === 'speedrun') return;` **Refactor init():** - Rename current `init()` to `initDailyPuzzle()` - New `init()` just sets up mode select event listeners and shows the mode selector - `startDailyMode()` calls `initDailyPuzzle()` - `startSpeedRunMode()` calls `initSpeedRunPuzzle()` **Header in speed run mode:** - Hide `#puzzle-number` - Optionally change subtitle or leave as-is **Footer in speed run mode:** - Hide the "new puzzle every day" text or change it ## Gotchas - The IIFE pattern means all new variables/functions must be declared inside the existing `(function() { ... })()` block - `state.selected` must be reset when loading a new puzzle in speed run - The `render()` function re-creates DOM elements, so event listeners are reattached each time — this is fine - Make sure `checkRows()` is called after generating a new speed run puzzle (in case a row is already correct) - The `handleCellClick` completion path currently calls `saveState()` and `showCompletionModal()` — these must be gated on `gameMode` - Timer should stop if user navigates away (not critical for MVP, but `endSpeedRun()` cleanup matters) - The swap counter should reset for each new puzzle in speed run mode - `countdownInterval` (midnight countdown) should NOT run in speed run mode

checklist.description: Mode selection screen with Daily Puzzle and Speed Run buttons
steps: Add #mode-select div to index.html before <main> with two mode buttons
Add CSS for mode-select layout: centered, full-height, dark background
Style mode buttons as large cards — daily (blue #4361ee), speed run (red #e94560)
Add .game-active class logic to #app — hide mode-select, show header/main/footer
Wire up click handlers for mode buttons in JS init()
Verify: page loads showing mode selector, both buttons visible and styled

checklist.description: Daily puzzle mode works exactly as before when selected
steps: Refactor existing init() into initDailyPuzzle() containing all current logic
startDailyMode() sets gameMode='daily', adds .game-active, calls initDailyPuzzle()
Verify: clicking Daily Puzzle loads the game with same behavior — grid, swaps, localStorage save/load, completion modal, confetti, share, countdown to midnight
Verify: localStorage key 'daily-addicted-state' is still used correctly

checklist.description: Speed Run mode: 150-second countdown timer displayed prominently
steps: Add #speedrun-bar with #speedrun-timer and #speedrun-solved to HTML
Style timer: large bold text, monospace digits (font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums)
Implement startSpeedRunTimer() with setInterval decrementing every second
Format display as M:SS (e.g., '2:30', '1:05', '0:03')
Add .critical class to timer when <= 30 seconds — red color + pulse animation
Verify: timer counts down from 2:30, turns red at 0:30, reaches 0:00

checklist.description: Speed Run uses same puzzle structure with random seeds
steps: Implement getRandomSeed() using Math.floor(Math.random() * 2147483647) + 1
startSpeedRunMode() generates first puzzle via generatePuzzle(getRandomSeed())
Initialize state with puzzle data (grid, solution, fixed, words, par, swaps=0, etc.)
Call checkRows() and render() after setup
Verify: speed run shows a valid puzzle grid with same 4x5 layout, fixed cells, and swap mechanics

checklist.description: Auto-advance: new random puzzle loads immediately on completion
steps: In handleCellClick completion block, check if gameMode === 'speedrun'
If speedrun: increment speedrunState.solved, update counter display
Generate new puzzle with getRandomSeed(), reset state fields
Call checkRows() and render() for the new puzzle
Do NOT call saveState(), showCompletionModal(), or launchConfetti()
Verify: completing a puzzle in speed run immediately shows a new different puzzle
Display 'Solved: 0' in #speedrun-solved element
Update text to 'Solved: N' each time a puzzle is completed
Style counter prominently in the speedrun bar
Verify: counter starts at 0 and increments with each completed puzzle

checklist.description: Speed Run Over modal on timer expiry
steps: Implement endSpeedRun(): clear timer interval, set state.completed=true, set speedrunState.active=false
Show #speedrun-modal with total puzzles solved
Display stats in #speedrun-result-stats (puzzles solved, maybe total swaps)
Wire 'Play Again' button to restart speed run mode
Wire 'Back to Menu' button to return to mode selector
Verify: when timer hits 0, input is disabled, modal shows with correct count

checklist.description: State isolation: speed run does not affect daily puzzle localStorage
steps: Add guard in saveState(): if (gameMode === 'speedrun') return
Ensure no localStorage writes happen during speed run gameplay
Verify: play speed run, then switch to daily — daily puzzle state is preserved
Verify: localStorage 'daily-addicted-state' is unchanged after speed run session

checklist.description: Clean integration: header, footer, and swap counter adapt to mode
steps: Hide #puzzle-number in speed run mode, show it in daily mode
Hide or update footer text in speed run mode
Swap counter resets for each new puzzle in speed run
Hide #speedrun-bar in daily mode
Verify: switching modes shows appropriate UI elements for each mode

quality_checklist.description: No redundant state: speedrun state is cleanly separated from daily state
steps: Check that speedrunState is not duplicating fields already in state object unnecessarily
Verify saveState() guard prevents any localStorage writes in speed run
Ensure no dead code paths from the refactoring

quality_checklist.description: Timer cleanup: no interval leaks on mode switch or replay
steps: Check that speedrunState.intervalId is cleared in endSpeedRun()
Check that switching to menu or replaying clears any existing interval first
Check that countdownInterval (midnight) is not started in speed run mode

quality_checklist.description: CSS follows existing conventions: custom properties, naming, structure
steps: Verify new CSS uses existing custom properties (--bg-primary, --color-accent, etc.)
Check naming follows existing patterns (kebab-case IDs, BEM-ish classes)
No inline styles in JS — all styling via classes

quality_checklist.description: JS follows existing IIFE pattern with no global leaks
steps: All new variables and functions are declared inside the existing IIFE
No new globals on window except if explicitly needed
var declarations used consistently (matching existing code style, not let/const)

quality_checklist.description: UI is responsive and matches existing dark theme aesthetic
steps: Mode selector looks good on mobile (380px) and desktop (481px+)
Timer and counter are readable at all breakpoints
Speedrun modal matches existing modal styling patterns

checks.description: Mode selection screen is shown on page load
steps: Open http://localhost:3000 in browser
Verify mode selector is visible with 'Daily Puzzle' and 'Speed Run' buttons
Verify game grid is NOT visible until a mode is selected
Click 'Daily Puzzle' button
Verify grid loads with puzzle number, swap counter, and same mechanics
Make a swap — verify counter increments and state saves to localStorage
Reload page, select Daily Puzzle — verify state is restored

checks.description: Speed Run mode starts with timer and counter
steps: Click 'Speed Run' button
Verify 2:30 timer is visible and counting down
Verify 'Solved: 0' counter is visible
Verify puzzle grid is displayed with working swap mechanics

checks.description: Speed Run auto-advances on puzzle completion
steps: In speed run mode, solve a puzzle (swap letters to form correct words)
Verify a new puzzle loads immediately without modal or navigation
Verify solved counter increments to 1
Verify timer continues running

checks.description: Speed Run results modal on timer expiry
steps: Let timer reach 0:00 (or test with shortened timer)
Verify 'Speed Run Over' modal appears showing total puzzles solved
Verify grid input is disabled (clicks do nothing)
Click 'Play Again' — verify new speed run session starts
Click 'Back to Menu' — verify mode selector is shown

checks.description: State isolation: speed run does not corrupt daily puzzle
steps: Play daily puzzle, make some swaps
Go back to menu, play speed run, solve puzzles
Go back to menu, select daily puzzle
Verify daily puzzle state is exactly as left (same grid, same swap count)
